author: @XJournalist111 (XJournalist)
content: Trump quote: 'Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!! Open the Fuckin' Strait, you crazy bastards, or you'll be living in Hell - JUST WATCH! Praise be to Allah. President DONALD J. TRUMP' — The Art of the Deal

author: @NewsArcIndia (NewsArc)
content: BOTTOM LINE: US says historic rescue ✅ | Iran says American defeat ✅ | Hormuz crisis deepens ✅ | Oil at $141 ✅ | Ceasefire talks ongoing ✅. The US-Iran war is entering a critical 48-hour window.

author: @baldwin_daniel_ (Daniel Baldwin)
content: President Trump extended his delay of not hitting Iranian power plants to Monday, April 6 at 8pm. He reaffirms that 'Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day' if Iran fails to make a deal by his deadline.

author: @runnershigh02 (Keith Clemons)
content: Stood up to Iran? They had 0 weapons grade uranium, until Trump pulled out of the deal! I'm so tired of you all treating as a savior, when he causes the problem!

content: 'WE GOT HIM' — U.S. Rescued Both F-15 Crew Members From Deep Inside Iran; Tehran Calls It American Defeat. Covered by newsarcindia.com

content: BREAKING: President Trump says Iran has 48 hours to open the Strait of Hormuz or 'all hell will reign down on Iran.' 'Remember when I gave Iran ten days to make a deal...' (truncated)
